HLLS PRODUCTION

Music · Film · Stories from Eastern Nepal

Born in the hills. Built for the world.

We craft music videos, short films, advertisements, and children's content from the heart of Eastern Nepal — for audiences everywhere. We source artists from renowned theater groups, record in local studios, and deliver cinematic quality that travels.

Our First Book!

Coming Soon

My Yellow Bus

A HilluMillu Story

Join Hillu and Millu on their first school bus adventure! From morning pickup to counting wheels, singing songs, spotting animals, and making best friends — this 24-page illustrated picture book takes young readers on a joyful ride through the Nepali countryside.

24 Pages Full Color For Kids English

Written by Nabin Chaulagain

Published by Hills Production
